name: Bonemeld
explicitMods: +18 to all Attributes
+2 to Level of all Minion Skill Gems
-2% to all Resistances per Minion from your Non-Vaal Skills
4% increased Defences per Minion from your Non-Vaal Skills
Minions gain added Resistances equal to 50% of your Resistances
flavourText: Hills of stark and jagged white it walks,
scratching your ribs without, within.
The Fiend has naught but Empty Eyes,
though sees you, it does, indeed.

name: Aegis Aurora
explicitMods: 383% increased Armour and Energy Shield
+10% to all Elemental Resistances
+5% to maximum Cold Resistance
+6% Chance to Block
Recover Energy Shield equal to 2% of Armour when you Block

flavourText: Born from the marriage of ice and sky,
the aurora evokes both awe and power.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Charges at a targeted location or enemy, pushing away enemies in your path and repeatedly dealing off-hand damage in a small area in front of you. 8 to 12 Added Physical Damage per 15 Armour or Evasion Rating on Shield
75% increased Stun Threshold reduction on enemies at Maximum charge distance
100% more Damage with Hits at Maximum Charge Distance
109% increased Movement Speed
